summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AUREM platform - backend APIs fully functional, frontend loads with correct branding, login works, dashboard displays Vanguard agents correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Initial login redirect doesn't work properly - requires manual navigation to /dashboard

passed_tests: User profile (/api/platform/me) returns correct admin data
Platform tiers endpoint returns 3 tiers (starter, growth, enterprise)
Homepage loads with AUREM/Polaris branding (no ReRoots)
Auth page shows 'Access AUREM Command Center' text
Dashboard shows AUREM Command Center title
Dashboard displays all 4 Vanguard Agents (Scout, Architect, Envoy, Closer)
Dashboard shows AUREM Online status indicator
Navigation sidebar shows all expected items (Command Center, Vanguard Swarm, Live Log, etc.)
POLARIS BUILT branding present throughout application
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication redirect issue - login succeeds but doesn't automatically redirect to dashboard, requires manual navigation
